title: An Gano Man Fetur a Ogoniland
body: Shell-BP ta fara hako mai a Ogoniland. Mutanen Ogoni ba su sami wani kuɗi daga ayyukan ba. Lalacewar muhalli ta fara nan take kuma ta ƙaru a cikin shekaru masu zuwa.

title: An Kafa MOSOP — Dokar Hakkin 'Yan Ogoni
body: Ken Saro-Wiwa da waɗansu sun kafa Movement for the Survival of the Ogoni People (MOSOP). An gabatar da Dokar Hakkin 'Yan Ogoni ga gwamnatin Najeriya da kuma al'ummar ƙasashen duniya, inda aka nemi mulkin kai na siyasa, gyaran muhalli, da kuma rabon kudaden mai.

title: Ranar Ogoni — Mutum 300,000 Sun Yi Zanga-Zanga
body: A ranar 4 ga Janairu, kimanin mutane 300,000 na Ogoni sun yi zanga-zangar lumana wadda aka sani da Ranar Ogoni — ɗaya daga cikin manyan zanga-zangar da aka shirya a tarihin Najeriya. Shell ta janye ma'aikatanta daga Ogoniland. Gwamnatin soja ta Najeriya ta tura Rivers State Internal Security Task Force.

title: Sojoji Sun Zalunce Ogoniland
body: Rundunar Lt Col Paul Okuntimo ta kai hare-hare, kashe mutane, da cin zarafin 'yancin ɗan adam a cikin al'ummomin Ogoni. An kashe ɗaruruwan 'yan Ogoni. An kama Ken Saro-Wiwa na ɗan lokaci sannan aka sake shi.

title: An Kama Su Bayan Kashe Mutane a Giokoo
body: A ranar 21 ga Mayu 1994, an kashe shugabannin Ogoni huɗu a wani taro na goyon bayan gwamnati a Giokoo. An kama Ken Saro-Wiwa, wanda ba ya nan, tare da sauran shugabannin MOSOP takwas. An zarge su duka da ƙarfafa kisan kai. Ƙungiyoyin kare hakkin ɗan adam sun fara yin tambaya game da zargin nan take.

title: Kotun Soja da Kisa
body: Kotun da gwamnatin soja ta nada ta yi shari'ar maza tara. An yi wa lauyoyin difai barazana. Babban shaida na ƙara daga baya ya karya shahadarsa, inda ya ce an yi masa cin hanci. Al'ummar ƙasashen duniya sun nemi a yi musu jinƙai. A ranar 10 ga Nuwamba 1995, an rataye Ken Saro-Wiwa, Saturday Dobee, Nordu Eawo, Daniel Gbooko, Paul Levura, Felix Nuate, Baribor Bera, Barinem Kiobel, da John Kpuinen a gidan yari na Port Harcourt.

title: Martanin Duniya — An Dakatar da Najeriya daga Commonwealth
body: An dakatar da Najeriya daga ƙungiyar Commonwealth of Nations. Amurka, Tarayyar Turai, da gwamnatoci da yawa sun ɗora takunkumi ko bayyana furucinsu. Shell ta fuskanci sukar duniya mai ɗorewa saboda haɗin guwiwarta, na gaske ko ta fuskance, a cikin ayyukan gwamnatin Najeriya.

title: Mutuwar Sani Abacha
body: Diktatoren soja Sani Abacha ya mutu yana kan mulki. Juyin mulki zuwa dimokuradiyya ya fara a Najeriya. Shari'ar Ogoni Tara ta zama babban abin tunani wajen tattauna alhaki na kamfanoni, adalcin muhalli, da haƙƙin mutanen tsiraru a ƙarƙashin mulkin kama-karya.

title: Shell Ta Biya Diyya — Wiwa v. Royal Dutch Shell
body: Shell ta amince ta biya dalar Amurka miliyan 15.5 don sulhunta ƙara da dangin Ken Saro-Wiwa da sauran waɗanda gwamnatin Najeriya ta yi musu laifi suka kawo a Amurka. Shell ta ƙi amincewa da kuskure. Sulhu ba ya ƙunshi yarda da laifi.

title: Rahoton UNEP kan Ogoniland
body: Shirin Muhalli na Majalisar Ɗinkin Duniya ya buga babban rahotonsa na muhalli na Ogoniland, inda ya bayyana yadda gurɓacewar mai ta shafi ƙasa, ruwa, da iska a duk yankin. Ya ba da shawarar asusun tsaftacewa na dalar Amurka biliyan 1 kuma ya kiyasta cewa cikakken gyaran muhalli na iya ɗaukar shekaru 25–30.

title: An Ƙaddamar da HYPREP
body: Gwamnatin Najeriya ta ƙaddamar da Hydrocarbon Pollution Remediation Project (HYPREP) don fara aiwatar da shawarwarin UNEP. An yi suka ga ci gabanta da cewa yana da jinkiri. Al'ummomin Ogoni suna ci gaba da rayuwa tare da ƙasa da ruwa masu guba.

title: Shugaba Tinubu Ya Ba Su Afuwa ta Bayan Mutuwa
body: Shugaban Najeriya Bola Ahmed Tinubu ya ba Ken Saro-Wiwa da sauran masu fafutuka takwas da aka kashe afuwa ta shugaban ƙasa bayan mutuwa. Dangin Saro-Wiwa da masu goyon bayansa sun maraba da wannan matakin tare da ci gaba da neman cikakken tabbatar da 'yancinsu a shari'a da kuma ayyukan gaskiya don gyara Ogoniland.
